verdict: First gold-style Gap Selling set built using the Jolt voice learnings. The content leans into problem diagnosis, personal cost, and relief framing rather than generic sales language.
strengths: Clear carryover of the approved Twitter voice
Strong fit with Gap Selling's move from surface pain to real pain
Engagement prompts are specific to owner pain and discovery work
problems: Needs human taste-check to confirm the simpler lines land well
May want one or two more dry asides if the tone still feels too straight
required_fixes: Review in chat and keep only the lines Chad would actually post
Refine further if any line feels too polished or too abstract
